title: Mucho Mucho Amor: The Legend of Walter Mercado
original_title: Mucho Mucho Amor: The Legend of Walter Mercado
overview: Once the world's most famous astrologer, Walter Mercado seeks to resurrect a forgotten legacy. Raised in the sugar cane fields of Puerto Rico, Walter grew up to become a gender non-conforming, cape-wearing psychic whose televised horoscopes reached 120 million viewers a day for decades before he mysteriously disappeared.
